overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game featuring a character in a trench coat and hat exploring a snowy European village at night. The character navigates through dimly lit interior spaces with wooden beams and stone walls, briefly exits to a snow-covered cobblestone street, and enters another building with a warm fireplace before ascending to a bedroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom with slanted wooden ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the dimly lit attic room, examining the surroundings and moving toward the doorway

entered.detail: exposed wooden beams forming a steep A-frame ceiling with dark wood texture
burgundy diamond-patterned wallpaper covering the slanted walls
wooden bed frame with white linens and red patterned bedspread
gold-framed painting depicting a landscape scene hanging on the wall
dark wood dresser with drawers against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit attic bedroom with slanted wooden ceilings and red patterned wallpaper. A bed with white sheets sits to the right while a wooden dresser stands to the left. The warm artificial lighting creates deep shadows among the exposed wooden beams as the character moves toward the exit.

events.description: character exits the attic room and begins descending wooden stairs
character opens wooden door and steps outside into the snowy village

agents.ego_description: carefully descending a narrow wooden staircase and approaching the exit door

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls with mortar visible between the blocks
dark stained wooden handrail along the staircase
ornamental wall-mounted lamp with warm yellow flame
wooden dining set visible through the doorway in the adjacent room

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow staircase with stone walls and wooden handrails, passing lit wall sconces. The scene transitions from the attic to a lower level with a dining area visible in the background, before approaching and opening a wooden door to exit the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered village street with stone buildings

events.description: exposure shifts from warm interior to cool blue moonlight of snowy night
character approaches and enters a different building with a lit doorway

agents.ego_description: walking along the snow-dusted cobblestone street between stone buildings, heading toward a lit entrance

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near a building entrance down the street

entered.detail: wet cobblestones partially covered with snow and ice reflecting blue light
European-style stone houses with snow-covered roofs and icicles
cast iron street lamp with warm glowing light
dark wooden picket fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a snowy European village at night, with cobblestone streets glistening under blue moonlight. Stone buildings with snow-laden roofs line the street, and a warm street lantern provides contrast to the cool ambient lighting. The character walks past wooden fences toward a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic living room with stone fireplace

events.description: entering warm interior illuminated by fireplace and lamps after cold blue exterior
character stops briefly to observe the fireplace before continuing to explore the room

agents.ego_description: entering the room and walking around the furniture, pausing to look at the burning fireplace before continuing toward the back of the house

entered.detail: large stone hearth with active fire burning and brick surround
bright orange flames providing warm illumination to the room
dark wood table with chairs arranged around it
vintage brass and wood phonograph with large horn speaker
ornamental ceiling fixture with multiple bulbs providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy interior space dominated by a large stone fireplace with a burning fire. The room features wooden beams, a dining table, and a vintage gramophone. Warm artificial lighting from the fire and hanging lamps contrasts sharply with the cold exterior. The character explores the perimeter of the room before heading toward a doorway.

events.description: character begins ascending carpeted wooden staircase to upper floor
entering the upstairs bedroom with red patterned walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase and entering the upstairs bedroom, approaching the bed

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with carpet runner and wooden bannister
ornate wooden bed with carved headboard and red bedding
burgundy diamond-patterned wallpaper matching the attic room
small wooden bedside table with items on top

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase with a carpet runner, passing framed pictures on the walls. Upon reaching the upper floor, the character enters a bedroom with red patterned wallpaper similar to the starting attic room. The space contains a wooden bed with white pillows and a nightstand, lit by warm wall-mounted lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded attic through a frozen village and into a cozy residence, eventually returning to a similar bedroom setting. It begins in a dimly lit attic with red patterned wallpaper and exposed beams, moving toward the exit and descending a narrow stone staircase past flickering wall sconces. As the character opens a wooden door, the scene shifts abruptly from the warm interior to a cold, moonlit European village where cobblestone streets glisten under a blue nocturnal glow. The camera then follows the character back inside a different building, moving from the freezing exterior into a warm room dominated by a roaring stone fireplace and a vintage gramophone. Finally, the movement ascends a steep carpeted staircase and passes framed pictures before entering an upper-floor bedroom that mirrors the red wallpaper and warm lighting of the initial room.
